verses.text: Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah-ah kiciam uh a, “Benjamin mite tungah kuamah in i tanu mo-in i kha kei ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Bethel-ah Israel mite hong pai-in Pasian' mai-ah nitak dong tu uh a, amaute nakpi takin a kap uh hi
Amaute in, “Israel-te' Pasian, Topa aw, tuni-in Israel-te sungah minam khat a pelemna ding, hih thu bang hangin Israel-te tungah hong tung ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
A zing ciangin mite tho baihin tua lai-ah biakna tau khat lam uh a, meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna a pia uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite in, “ Topa-a' ding kikhopna-ah Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin kua teng hong pailo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Topa kiangah a pailo mite tawh kisai-in Mizpah-ah kiciamna lianpi khat bawl uh a, “Kithat ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Israel mite in a sanggam uh Benjamin mite khasiat uh a, “Tuni-in Israel-te' sung panin minam khat bei hi
Eite in i tanute amaute tungah zi dingin pialo ding hi hang, ci-in Topa tawh kiciam khin ihih ciangin a nungta lai amaute' zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in, “ Topa kiang Mizpah-ah Israel minamte hong pailo a om hiam?” a ci uh hi. En in, Jabeshgilead panin tua giahphual kikhopna-ah kuamah pailo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh mite a kikhop ciangin, tua lai-ah Jabeshgilead-a tengte khat zong omlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin mihonte in a galhangte uh mihing tul sawm leh tul nih tua lai-ah sawl uh a, “Pai un la Jabeshgilead-a tengte namsau tawh va vatgawp un la, nupite leh naupang neute zong hih un
Hih bangin na hih ding uh hi: Pasal khempeuh leh pasal tawh a lumkhawmsa numei khempeuh na sumai ding uh hi,” ci-in thu pia uh hi
Amaute in Jabeshgilead-a teng mite lakah pasal tawh a lumkhawm nailo nungakno za li mu uh a, Kanaan gama om Shiloh giahphualah tuate hong paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin mihon buppite in Rimmon Suangpi-a om Benjamin mite kiangah thu puak a, amaute kiangah kilemna thu gen uh hi
Tua hun ciangin Benjamin-te hong ciah uh a, amaute in Jabeshgilead numei a hinga a koihte uh pia uh a, ahi zongin amau-a' dingin kicing zolo hi
Israel minamte sungah Topa in kitapkhapna omsak ahih manin mite in Benjamin-te khasiat uh hi
Tua ciangin mihonte' upate in, “Benjamin-te' sung panin numeite kithat khin ahih manin a omlai mite' zi ding bang cih ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Amaute in, “Israel-te sung panin minam khat a beilohna dingin Benjamin a suakta laite-a' dingin gamhluah a om ding kisam hi
Ahi zongin amau' zi dingin i tanute i pia thei kei hi,” a ci uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite kiciam khinin, “Benjamin-te tungah zi a pia mipa in samsiatna ngah ta hen,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin amaute in, “En un, Bethel leilu lam, Bethel panin Shekhem lamah a paito lam lianpi nisuahna lam, Lebonah leitaw lamah a om Shiloh-ah Topa-a' ding kumsim pawi khamna om hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Benjamin mite thu pia-in, “Pai-in leenggui lote-ah bukin
vil un. Laamna-ah Shiloh nungakte a laam dingin hong pai uh leh, leenggui lote panin note in delhin mi khempeuh in na zi ding ciat uh Shiloh nungakte man un la, Benjamin gamah ciahpih un

Amau' pate ahi a, a sanggampate uh ahi zongin a lungkimlohna uh kote' kiangah a gen dingin hong pai uh ciangin kote in amaute kiangah, ‘Kote tungah hehpihna tawh amaute hong pia un; bang hang hiam cih leh mi khempeuh zi ding galsimna sungah ka ngahsakzo kei uh a, note zong a mawh na suahlohna dingun note in amaute tungah utna tawh na piaktawm uh ahi kei hi,’ ka ci ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Benjamin mite zong tua bangmahin gamta uh a, amau mi a phazah tawh kituakin a laamte lak panin a zi dingun a la uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute pai-in a gamhluahna uhah ciahkik uh a, khuapite lamkikin a sungah a teng uh hi
Tua hun ciangin Israel midangte tua lai panin paikhia uh a, mi khempeuh amau' minam leh a innkuanpih ciat, amau' gamhluahna ciatah a ciah uh hi
Tua hun lai-in Israel-te sungah kumpi omlo a, amau' hoihsak bang ciatin mi khempeuh a gamta uh hi.
